---
title: "Creating the open graph image for this website with `plotnine`"
subtitle: "[Placeholder]" 
date: 2026.02.05
categories: ['python', 'website']
---

In the same vein as [my previous post](../../2025/create-favicon-with-ggplot2/index.qmd).

::: {#imports .cell execution_count=1}
``` {.python .cell-code}
from plotnine import *
from matplotlib import font_manager
```
:::


## Styles

::: {#design-variables .cell execution_count=2}
``` {.python .cell-code}
blue = "#0063dc"
dpi = 320
font = "InterVariable"
```
:::


### Font

As I did for the favicon, I want to use the font `Inter`. With R and ggplot2, I could simply create a variable called _font_ with the value `Inter` and reference it inside `geom_text` calls. However, it does not work here.

Using _matplotlib_, I need to find the path to the font and then add it to the font manager:

::: {#fonts-list .cell execution_count=3}
``` {.python .cell-code}
flist = font_manager.findSystemFonts()
slist = [s for s in flist if font in s] # list of filepaths with the font name
```
:::


`slist` returns paths like these:

```python
['/Users/{username}/Library/Fonts/InterVariable.ttf',
 '/Users/{username}/Library/Fonts/Inter.ttc',
 '/System/Library/Fonts/Supplemental/SignPainter.ttc',
 '/Users/{username}/Library/Fonts/InterVariable-Italic.ttf']
```

I will provide the path of my choice to the fontManager:



::: {#add-to-fontmanager .cell execution_count=5}
``` {.python .cell-code}
font_manager.fontManager.addfont(cpath)
```
:::


## Canvas 

::: {#cell-canvas .cell execution_count=6}
``` {.python .cell-code}
width_px = 1200
height_px = 630

p = (
    ggplot()
    + geom_tile(aes(x=0, y=0, width=width_px, height=height_px), fill=blue)
    + theme_void()
    + scale_x_continuous(expand=[0, 0])
    + scale_y_continuous(expand=[0, 0])
)

p
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=22}
![](index_files/figure-html/canvas-output-1.png){#canvas width=672 height=480}
:::
:::


## Text

::: {#591c1811 .cell execution_count=7}
``` {.python .cell-code}
p = p + geom_text(
    aes(x=-400, y=-250),
    label="garytouet.com",
    family=font,
    fontweight="bold",
    color="white",
    size=11,
)

p
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}
```
findfont: Font family 'InterVariable' not found.
findfont: Font family 'InterVariable' not found.
findfont: Font family 'InterVariable' not found.
```
:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=23}
![](index_files/figure-html/cell-8-output-2.png){width=672 height=480}
:::
:::


## Photo

## Save to disk

::: {#save-image-to-disk .cell execution_count=8}
``` {.python .cell-code}
p.save(
    filename="images/open_graph.jpg",
    width=width_px / dpi,
    height=height_px / dpi,
    units="in",
    dpi=dpi,
)
```
